arts.ttl: Arsenal receive major Viktor Gyokeres transfer update as January reality now clear
arts.sum: That means Gyokeres will still be playing Champions League football next month and should only aid Sporting in holding onto the player beyond Monday's transfer deadline . The teenage striker started in place of Gyokeres for the second time in a week, having also done so away against RB Leipzig in their penultimate league phase game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have decision to make over Tel, Duran and Ferguson transfers
arts.sum: Given Arsenal's need for a new striker before the January transfer market closes for business, Mikel Arteta's side should be all over Jhon Duran. The Aston Villa striker has proved himself in the Premier League, despite his limited chances under Unai emery.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry has already delivered Ollie Watkins verdict amid Arsenal bid for Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Arsenal have been looking for a striker all month and, on Wednesday, they tried their luck with a bid for Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins. The...

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins won't force Arsenal move
arts.sum: Romano reveals Arsenal's £60m bid for Watkins was rejected by Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Champions League knockout draw: Date, possible fixtures, format, bracket
arts.sum: The draw for the knockout playoff round of the new-look UEFA Champions League is upon us. Here's when it takes place and how it works.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Champions League play-offs and knockout bracket as Premier League quartet learn fate
arts.sum: All 36 teams competing in this year's new-look Champions League played their final league fixture, with some banking a play-off place and others moving through to the Round of 16

arts.ttl: Arsenal teenager Ethan Nwaneri scores winner at Girona on full CL debut
arts.sum: The Gunners secured direct passage to the last 16.

arts.ttl: Neto endures NIGHTMARE Arsenal debut as he makes huge error to gift Girona the opening goal... and it's a former Tottenham player who scores!
arts.sum: Neto, making his first appearance for the Gunners at the age of 35 years and 194 days, was in in place of regular No 1 David Raya but the night was marked by a huge mistake from him.

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta to name strong Arsenal team in Girona as he eyes momentum for Man City showdown
arts.sum: Arteta rules out mass rotation for Champions League dead-rubber in Spain
